name: WLF_LI_AG_RELATIONS_F
description: Table to store Access Group Relations.

columns.Name: LI_AG_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: Surrogate Key identifying the row

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: CATALOG_LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to WLF_LEARNING_ITEM_F table. This is the Learning Item Id for Course, Offering, Specialization that are going to be associated with the access group

columns.Name: ACCESS_LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to WLF_LEARNING_ITEM_F table. This is the learning Item id of the access group. This can be accessed via WLF_EVENT_ASSIGNMENTS and WLF_EVENTS. This is denormalized on to this table for fast access.

columns.Name: EVENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to WLF_EVENT_ASSIGNMENTS_F , Access Profile

columns.Name: PRIORITY
columns.Comments: Priority of the access group with in the list of access groups for a given catalog learning item

columns.Name: PRICING_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Pricing rule for the combination of Catalog Learning Item and Access Group Learning Item

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to WLF_ACCESS_PERMISSIONS_F for storing permissions

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the relation

columns.Name: FOLLOW_LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This column will be populated only on adhoc access groups with one of the destinations as a learning_item_id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: FOLLOW_AG_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: FOLLOW_AG_RELATION_ID

columns.Name: PAYMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule payment type. Foreign key to  WLF_PAYMENT_RULES_F.

columns.Name: LI_AG_RELATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey to uniquely identify Access Group Relation.

columns.Name: IN_ELASTIC
columns.Comments: Indicates if access group is processed to security index or not
